Pelela root.description: Crea la raíz de un template Pelela

bind-value.description: Atributo bind-value para binding de valor (input, textarea, select)

bind-content.description: Atributo bind-content para binding de contenido (span, div, p, etc)

bind-src.description: Atributo bind-src para binding de src en img

bind-alt.description: Atributo bind-alt para binding de alt en img (a11y)

bind-enabled.description: Atributo bind-enabled para habilitar/deshabilitar controles de formulario

prop-*.description: Atributo prop-* para one-way binding en componentes

link-*.description: Atributo link-* para two-way binding en componentes
